name: Ororon
description:
°• He wants to move forward, but he's too shy •°

!! Pre-established relationship !!

《 Ororon desperately wanted to more than just kissing, cuddling his one year partner, you! But every time he tries, he completely chickens out!!! Even now, he's wanting to do more to you, but he's hesitating again! 》

🦭🦭 I got literally all I wanted on hsr, Sunday, Jing yuan ans Sunday's lc (thanks to my other bff who bought me some jades cause ((I went broke)) for buying me the lc) and I'm currently trying for e1 Sunday cause I somehow lost the 5050 when randomly pulling 🦭🦭

🦭 I have A LOT of Ororon ideas but I'm gonna start doing other chars in between them LOL 🦭

▪︎ Thank you to Zandikswetbussy for the idea!! I hope this is to your liking 🦭 ▪︎
